prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UPD-BARBIESTYLINGHEAD-PINK Product Type: TOY_FIGURE Brand (from catalog): Barbie Existing Title: Barbie Styling Head Description: Dress up just like Mom with the Deluxe Barbie Styling Head.

This styling head comes with everything a little girl needs to dress Barbie up - a hair brush, headband, and 3 hair ties. Young girls can even wear the head band and style their hair the same way to look just like Barbie. They can practice and perfect cute hair styles on Barbie with her long silky hair made specially for styling. This pretend play set is a great gift idea for young kids wanting to learn how to braid, groom and style their own hair. Search Terms: styling head styling head doll for girls doll head for hair styling doll head for hair styling kids doll styling head styling head for girls girls styling head doll styling head for girls head styling doll styling hair doll head barbie Features: - Officially Licensed Mattel Barbie Styling Head - 7 Piece Set - Comes with Hair Brush, Headband and 3 Hair Ties - Wear and Share Accessories - Color of Hair: Blonde - Ages 3 and Up === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: 7-Piece Set, Hair Brush, Headband, Hair Ties, Wearable Accessories, Ages 3 And Up

openai.title_differentiation: 7 Piece Set, Hair Brush, Headband, 3 Hair Ties, Wear And Share Accessories, Blonde Hair, Ages 3 And Up
